nasb.text: She is not afraid of the snow for her household, For all her household are clothed with scarlet.

esv.text: She is not afraid of snow for her household, for all her household are clothed in scarlet.

cnv.text: 她不因下雪為自己的家人擔心， 因為她全家都穿著溫暖的朱紅色衣服。

ccb.text: 她不因下雪而为家人担心， 因为全家都穿着朱红暖衣。

csbs.text: 她不因下雪而为家人担心， 因为全家都穿着红线的衣服。
